titleStmt.title: SII 22.371: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 371. (A.R. No. 371 of 1906) TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT, PUDUKKOTTAI STATE, KUḌUMIYĀMALAI. MĒLAIKKŌYIL ROCK-CUT TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. TRIBH. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶADĒVA (I)—45th YEAR (A.D. 1114-15).

summary.p: This records a gift of a lamp-stand and 96 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirunalakkuṉṟam-Ūḍaiyār in Iraṭṭapāḍikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu by a Veḷḷāḷa resident of Kāraiyūr by name Veṭāṇ Poṉṉaṉ alias Sembiyan Kōnāṭṭuvēḷāṉ and another gift for a similar purpose, of 4 mā of land at Iluppaikkuḍi village made cultivable after its purchase from the temple itself by Vēḷāṉ Poṟkāmaṉ alias Uttamaśōḻa. Mūvēndavēḷān of Iḍaiyāṟṟur in the same nāḍu. Both the gifts are said to have been left in charge of the Sivabrāhmanas of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sva sti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakravarttikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 45Āvatu Iraṭṭapāṭikoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirunalak kuṉṟamuṭaiyāṟku Iṉṉāṭṭuk kāraiyūr veḷāṉ poṉṉaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ koṉāṭṭu veḷāṉ Ittevaṟkut ti
rununtāviḷakku Iravu pakal Erikkaikku Ittevar civabrāhmaṇarkkuc camaitta paratvāci kuravaṭi teṟṟi Uḷḷiṭṭārkkum paratvāci kuṉṟantevanuḷḷiṭṭārkkum pāratvāci cūṟṟi kuṉṟanuḷḷiṭṭārkkum paratvāci koyil mātanuḷḷiṭṭārkkuñ camai
nta civabrāhmaṇarvacam Aṭutta veḷḷāṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭu keraḷāntakaṉ Uḻakkāl nittaṟpaṭi Uḻakku ney Iravu pakal Erippārkaḷāka śantrādittavaṟ Upaiyamākki
kkoṇṭu celuttakkaṭavarkaḷākat tiruviḷakkukku vaitteṉ cempiyaṉ koṉāpaṭu veḷāṉeṉ Ittevarkku Ivviḷakkeriya Iṭṭa nilaiviḷakkoṟṟiṉāl tarāniṟaila� Iṭṭeṉ veḷāṉeṉ Ittevaṟku Iṉā
ṭṭu Iṭaiyāṟṟūr veḷāṉ poṟkāmaṉāṉa Uttama coḻamuventa veḷāṉeṉ tirununtā viḷakku 1 Erikkaikku Ittevar tevatāṉam Iluppaikkuṭiyiṟ kiḻvayal cārviḷaiyā veṇkaḷarāyk kiṭanta nilam vilaiyākac caṇṭeśvara devarkku
ṟā Iṭṭa kācu n=ta Ikkācu mukkālukku vilaiyākak koṇṭu tirutti nannila mākki viṭṭa nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai Atiya maṅkalattuk kuḷattu nirkovaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kāviti vayalukku vaṭakkum melpāṟke
yaṟṟāḷ vayalukkum poṉmativeṅkaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ammaṅkainallūr vayalukkut teṟkum Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilattil nāṉ vayakki viṭṭanilam nālu mā Innilam nālumāvuṅ kaikkoṇṭu muṟcollappa
ṭṭa civabrāhmaṇare candrātittavar keraḷān=taka Uḻakkāl nittaṟpaṭi Uḻakku ney tiruviḷakkerippārkaḷāka Innilam viṭṭeṉ Uttamacoḻa muventaveḷāṉeṉ Ittiruviḷakkeriya Iṭṭa nilaiviḷakku Oṉṟiṉāl tarāniṟai Aimpatu Ippaṭi Ittiru
nuntāviḷakkuc celuttakkaṭavomāṉom muṉcollappaṭṭa civabrāhmaṇa- rom Itu panmaheśvarara [kṣai*] ....
Digital edition of SII 22.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
